findings.title: Non-refundable Deposit and Substitution
findings.why: Golden Hour Photography includes a non-refundable deposit and reserves the right to substitute photographers, which risks losing money or receiving unexpected service quality.
findings.do: Negotiate for partial refund of the deposit and a clause requiring consent for any substitutions.

findings.title: Hidden Fees in Photography
findings.why: Golden Hour Photography adds a 22% service fee on top of the quoted price, which unexpectedly increases costs.
findings.do: Clarify the total final cost including these fees to avoid surprises.

findings.title: Venue Cancellation Penalties
findings.why: Bella Vista Hall forfeits 100% of payments if cancelled 180 days before the event, which could result in a total loss if plans change.
findings.do: Discuss more flexible cancellation terms, potentially allowing for partial refunds.

findings.title: Venue Rescheduling Penalties
findings.why: Bella Vista Hall's auto-renewal and rebooking fee if postponed can lead to additional expenses.
findings.do: Negotiate to minimize or eliminate rebooking fees for date changes.

findings.title: Exclusive Dispute Location
findings.why: Golden Hour Photography's dispute resolution in Anchorage might be inconvenient if the couple is not local.
findings.do: Ask if disputes can be settled in a more convenient location.
